phrases.intent_en: Ask what is showing this week at the opera
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qui est programmé cette semaine à l'opéra ?
phrases.pronunciation: kes-SEE kee eh pro-gra-MAY SET seh-MEN ah lo-pay-RAH
phrases.cultural_note: The Opéra de Nice presents opera, ballet, and orchestral concerts throughout the season (October–June).

responses.english: It is posted at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if any tickets are still available for tonight's performance
phrases.text_local: Reste-t-il des places disponibles pour le spectacle de ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: REST-teel day PLAS dees-po-NEEBL poor leh spek-TAKL deh seh SWAR
phrases.cultural_note: Last-minute tickets are sometimes available at reduced prices — always worth asking at the box office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the best seats in the house
phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les meilleures places dans la salle ?
phrases.pronunciation: KEL son lay may-YUHR PLAS dan lah SAL
phrases.cultural_note: The Opera's ornate 19th-century auditorium has excellent acoustics throughout — the dress circle offers great views.

responses.english: The boxes in the first row.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the box office opens
phrases.text_local: La billetterie ouvre-t-elle à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah bee-yeh-TREE OO-vreh-TEL ah kel UHR
phrases.cultural_note: The box office is typically open from Tuesday to Saturday, and on performance days in the evening.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a dress code for the evening
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un code vestimentaire pour assister au spectacle du soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un KOD ves-tee-man-TEHR poor ah-sees-TAY oh spek-TAKL doo SWAR
phrases.cultural_note: Smart casual is generally expected at the opera. Premieres and galas call for formal attire.
